description: VoIP User Agent app for Android based on baresip SIP library This is a baresip based SIP User Agent application for Android. Currently baresip app supports voice calling, voice conference calls, text messages, voicemail Message Waiting Indication as well as blind and attended call transfers. Voice can be coded with Opus, AMR, Codec2, G.729, G.722, G.722.1, or PCMU/PCMA codecs. Security is achieved via TLS or WSS SIP signaling transport and ZRTP or (DTLS) SRTP media encapsulation. Development of baresip app is motivated by need for a secure, open source SIP based VoIP User Agent for Android that does not depend on proprietary, third party push notification services. This application can be installed on Android devices running Android version 9 or later. If you need video calling, you can instead of this application install its sister application baresip+. Source code is available in master branch of GitHub project, where also issues can be reported.
